world.premise: The village of Bramblefork stands at the edge of the Gloamwood, where an old watchtower has begun shining with a ghostly green lantern no one remembers lighting. Travelers are vanishing on the north road, and the village reeve is quietly desperate for help before panic breaks the harvest festival.
world_facts: Bramblefork is a small frontier village that survives on milling, trapping, and trade caravans.
The Gloamwood is old, mist-heavy, and full of half-remembered barrows, shrines, and ruined watch posts.
The Lantern Tower once served as a warning beacon against raiders, but it has been abandoned for decades.
A green light now burns from the tower each night, even in rain and heavy fog.
People in Bramblefork believe the road disappearances are connected to the relit tower.
The village is preparing for the Lanternwake harvest festival even as fear spreads.
world.magic_system: Magic is rare, practical, and unsettling. Common folk know charms and warding signs, but true spellcraft is unusual and often treated with caution. Supernatural forces leave marks on places, objects, and people, and those traces can be investigated.

factions.name: The Reeve's Council
factions.description: The local civil authority trying to keep Bramblefork calm and functioning.
factions.goals: Protect the harvest festival, stop the disappearances, avoid mass panic.
factions.methods: Quiet investigation, small rewards, careful public messaging.

factions.name: The Mosswardens
factions.description: A loose fellowship of trappers, scouts, and wardens who know the forest trails.
factions.goals: Keep the deep wood from swallowing the village's borders.
factions.methods: Trailcraft, local knowledge, practical superstition, hidden waymarks.

player_character.name: The Wayfarer
player_character.appearance: Travel-worn cloak, sturdy boots, watchful eyes, and gear kept in careful order.
player_character.personality: Curious, cautious, and willing to help if the danger feels real.
player_character.background: A wandering adventurer with enough experience to know when a simple village problem is hiding something stranger.
player_character.wants: Earn trust, uncover the truth of the lantern, and keep innocent people alive.
player_character.fears: Being too late, walking into a trap, and letting the supernatural set the terms of the encounter.
player_character.how_seen: An outsider who might be exactly the kind of trouble Bramblefork needs.

places.name: Bramblefork Square
places.description: A muddy central square ringed by timber buildings, lantern posts, and a market cross.
places.current_state: Busy by day, tense by night.

places.name: The Lantern Tower
places.description: A crumbling stone watchtower on a low ridge north of the village, now lit by an eerie green flame.
places.current_state: Visible from the village every night.

places.name: The Bent Stag Inn
places.description: The best place in Bramblefork to hear rumors, make introductions, and find nervous caravan guards.

npcs.name: Reeve Alden Marr
npcs.appearance: Grey-bearded, broad-shouldered, and worn thin by responsibility.
npcs.personality: Pragmatic, guarded, and grateful for competence.
npcs.current_state: Trying to solve the crisis without spreading panic.

npcs.name: Sella Thorn
npcs.appearance: Lean, sharp-eyed, with a hunter's braid and a moss-green cloak.
npcs.relationship_to_player: Possible guide into the Gloamwood if trust is earned.
npcs.current_state: Investigating signs near the north road.

npcs.name: Brother Cal
npcs.appearance: A stooped shrine-keeper with ink-stained fingers and a lantern charm at his throat.
npcs.personality: Gentle, anxious, and unusually knowledgeable about old rites.
npcs.relationship_to_player: Nervous source of lore and local history.
npcs.current_state: Afraid the green light marks a broken ward.

narrative_threads.title: The Green Lantern
narrative_threads.description: Find out why the old tower is lit again and what force is sustaining the flame.

narrative_threads.title: The Missing Travelers
narrative_threads.description: Track what happened to those who vanished on the north road.

narrative_threads.title: Festival Under Shadow
narrative_threads.description: Decide whether Bramblefork can safely continue Lanternwake while the threat grows.
